title: Heading levels should only increase by one
summary: Use heading levels in order (h1 → h2 → h3); don't skip levels for styling.

code.title: Heading levels should only increase by one
code.summary: Use heading levels in order (h1 → h2 → h3); don't skip levels for styling.
code.what_changed: Use heading levels in order (h1 → h2 → h3); don't skip levels for styling.
code.why: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct

improvement_summary: The redesigned version fixes 'Heading levels should only increase by one'. Use heading levels in order (h1 → h2 → h3); don't skip levels for styling. This addresses a moderate barrier and improves conformance with WCAG best practices.
highlights: Resolves a moderate issue mapped to WCAG best practice
